overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through a neon-lit night market alley. The player moves past food stalls with red Japanese lanterns and cyberpunk signage, encountering NPC vendors and pedestrians in a wet, atmospheric urban setting.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow cyberpunk food alley with covered stalls

events.description: entering the covered market area from the darker exterior alley
slowing approach to the food stall counter

agents.ego_description: walking through the narrow alley approaching a ramen food stall with red paper lanterns

notable_agents.action: vendor working behind the counter preparing food with steam rising from cooking equipment

entered.detail: overhead corrugated metal and fabric awning covering the alley
food counter with WNS neon signage and cooking equipment
traditional Japanese-style red paper lanterns hanging in a row
white circular bar stools lined up at the food counter

segments.scene_description: The player enters a narrow covered alleyway approaching a food stall marked with red paper lanterns. The vendor is visible working behind the counter as steam rises from cooking equipment. The space is enclosed with corrugated metal roofing and illuminated by cyan and red neon lights reflecting off the wet asphalt.

scene_state.functional_zone: transition area between stalls opening into main market

events.description: passing the first food stall and entering the wider market area
shift from red-dominant lighting to purple and magenta neon hues

agents.ego_description: moving past the first stall and entering the wider market thoroughfare with more visible activity ahead

notable_agents.action: customer sitting at the counter eating food
person in yellow jacket walking ahead into the market

entered.detail: food stall with purple neon lighting and zebra-print patterned pillar
open corridor extending into the distance with multiple stalls visible
bright green stools at the purple-lit stall

segments.scene_description: The player moves past the first food stall into a transition area where the space opens up. A customer sits at the counter on the right while ahead, the market corridor extends with purple and magenta neon lighting. A pedestrian in a yellow jacket walks ahead into the denser market area.

scene_state.functional_zone: bustling cyberpunk night market with multiple food vendors

events.description: entering the main market street with dense neon signage and multiple pedestrians
navigating around pedestrians walking in the market corridor

agents.ego_description: walking through the busy market street passing multiple stalls and navigating around pedestrians

notable_agents.action: woman in pink pants and dark jacket walking toward the camera
person in white jacket leaning over a counter interacting with a vendor

entered.detail: multiple food vendor stalls lining both sides of the walkway
dense cluster of neon signs in Japanese characters and English
illuminated vending machine with glowing display
hanging television screen displaying animated advertisements

segments.scene_description: The player enters the main market thoroughfare densely packed with food stalls, neon signage, and pedestrians. Multiple vendors operate stalls on both sides while customers sit at counters. The corridor is filled with hanging red lanterns, purple and cyan neon lights, and wet reflective asphalt. The player navigates through moderate foot traffic including a woman in pink pants walking toward the camera.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from a narrow, enclosed alleyway into the expansive, neon-drenched heart of a bustling night market. It begins by entering a covered passage under corrugated metal roofing, moving toward a food stall where steam rises from cooking equipment beneath glowing red paper lanterns. As the camera passes the vendor, the space opens up into a transition area illuminated by purple and magenta lights, following a pedestrian in a yellow jacket deeper into the corridor. The scene then expands into a dense main thoroughfare packed with multiple vendors and hanging lanterns, where cyan and purple neon reflects off the wet asphalt. Finally, the camera navigates through a crowd of pedestrians, including a woman in pink pants, as the environment reaches its peak of urban density and atmospheric light.
